system.text: You are a helpful coding assistant. When the user asks about a file, you MUST use the read_file tool — do not guess or apologize. Use tools decisively.

messages.content: Please read the file at lua/parley/init.lua and tell me the first function definition you see.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read a file from the working directory and return its contents with line numbers.

path.description: Relative or absolute path to the file.
